extra.reason: Primary root cause found+fixed: gluon gfx950 MoE applied GPT-OSS swiglu s*(linear+1) to plain-silu Qwen3.5. Fix routes silu MXFP4 MoE to Triton; output now coherent. Residual activation-scale tracked separately.

Misdiagnosis: triton MXFP4 MoE path uses dynamic fp4 activations (is_w4a8_fp8=False -> no input_scale -> dynamic branch). Static-fp8 was the gluon assumption, no longer relevant after routing silu->triton. Verified on 35B+397B configs.
